title: [lora_l2.c:54-60] state_names array and LORA_STATE_COUNT coupling is fragile
description: The state_names array at lines 54-60 uses designated initializers matching the enum values. If someone adds a new enum value between existing ones or reorders the enum, the array would have gaps or mismatches. The valid_transitions matrix at lines 63-70 has the same issue. Consider adding a BUILD_ASSERT that ARRAY_SIZE(state_names) == LORA_STATE_COUNT to catch mismatches at compile time.
close_reason: Fixed: added BUILD_ASSERT(ARRAY_SIZE(state_names) == LORA_STATE_COUNT) to catch enum/array mismatch at compile time
